title: DirectorBatchResponse
description: Structured output enforced on the LLM by `response_schema` (Gemini) or json-mode + post-validation (GitHub Models). Mirrors the Pydantic models in app/domain/director_verdicts.py.

twist_id.description: Public id (UUID v4) of the twist being classified. MUST match one of the public_ids the model was given in the user prompt. Verdicts for unknown ids are ignored by the filter.

decision.description: The classification. Maps 1:1 to `twists.status` after persistence.

reason.description: Short Spanish justification. Server truncates to 80 chars with `…` if exceeded.

verdicts.reason: Continúa la trama del cliffhanger con tono coherente.
No responde al cliffhanger; menciona elementos ajenos a la bible.
